prompt:
Professional brand guidelines poster, single vertical page, dark background (#0A0A0C). Premium agency design document, ultra clean and modern. Two-column grid layout with thin dark border lines (#1A1A1E) separating each section.

TOP HEADER (top 12%):
Left: 'BRAND' in very large bold white blocky geometric extended sans-serif (like Microgramma Extended Bold), 'GUIDELINES' directly below in same font but grey (#707070). Right side: 'MM AGENCY.' wordmark in white bold blocky uppercase with a yellow (#FAFA00) period dot. Behind the header, a very subtle dark radial glow in yellow, barely visible.

LEFT COLUMN, SECTION 1 — COMPANY LOGO:
Small yellow dot bullet + 'COMPANY LOGO' in tiny uppercase bold text. Below: a dark rounded rectangle (#181818) containing 'MM AGENCY.' in large bold white blocky geometric uppercase text with yellow dot. Below the box: small yellow monospace text 'CHAKRA PETCH BOLD' and smaller grey text with hex values.

RIGHT COLUMN, SECTION 1 — LOGO VARIATIONS:
Small yellow dot + 'LOGO VARIATIONS' in tiny uppercase. Three small cards in a horizontal row: Card 1 dark bg with white 'MM AGENCY.' text, labeled 'Dark Background'. Card 2 white/light bg with black 'MM AGENCY.' text and yellow dot, labeled 'Light Background'. Card 3 dark bg with all yellow 'MM AGENCY.' text, labeled 'Yellow Accent'. Below: three more small cards showing circular brandmarks — circles with thick yellow (#FAFA00) ring border containing bold white 'MM' letters inside, on dark backgrounds. Labels: 'Brandmark', 'Stacked', 'Box Mark'.

LEFT COLUMN, SECTION 2 — LOGO CLEARSPACE:
Small yellow dot + 'LOGO CLEARSPACE'. Dark rounded box containing the wordmark with yellow dashed lines around it forming an exclusion zone rectangle. Small corner marks at each corner. An 'X' measurement annotation on the left side. Below: small grey monospace text explaining clearspace equals height of M.

RIGHT COLUMN, SECTION 2 — BRAND PALETTE:
Small yellow dot + 'BRAND PALETTE'. Grid of 8 color swatches, 2 per row, 4 rows. Each swatch is a filled circle with the color name in bold tiny white text and HEX + RGB values in tiny grey monospace text next to it. Colors in order: YELLOW circle (#FAFA00), WHITE circle (#FAFAFA), VIOLET circle (#713DFF), ORANGE circle (#F54900), CYAN circle (#00E3FF), PINK circle (#FCA8FF), GREY circle (#707070), DARK circle (#181818 with thin white outline).

LEFT COLUMN, SECTION 3 — TYPOGRAPHY:
Small yellow dot + 'TYPOGRAPHY'. Three font specimens stacked. Each has large 'Ab' on the left and font name + alphabet on the right. Specimen 1: 'Ab' in bold blocky geometric font, 'CHAKRA PETCH' / 'BOLD (700)' in yellow label, then uppercase + lowercase alphabet. Specimen 2: 'Ab' in clean sans-serif, 'DM SANS' / 'REGULAR (400)'. Specimen 3: 'Ab' in monospace, 'DM MONO' / 'REGULAR (400)' with numbers 0-9.

RIGHT COLUMN, SECTION 3 — ICONOGRAPHY + BUTTONS:
Top half: Small yellow dot + 'ICONOGRAPHY STYLE'. Grid of 8 icons (4 columns x 2 rows) in dark rounded squares (#202020) with subtle border. Icons are NoGood-style: line chart with yellow-to-orange gradient line going upward, horizontal bar chart with gradient bars, target/bullseye concentric circles with yellow glow, ascending staircase blocks in yellow-to-orange gradient with dotted diagonal arrow, growth trending arrow, globe wireframe, lightning bolt, connected nodes network pattern. All icons are clean, minimal, using yellow (#FAFA00) to orange (#F54900) gradient colors on dark backgrounds. NOT simple line icons — they are graphic illustrations like data visualizations.

Bottom half: Small yellow dot + 'BUTTON STYLE'. Three buttons in a row: Solid bright yellow (#FAFA00) button with black bold text 'GET STARTED' labeled 'Primary'. White outline button with white text 'LEARN MORE' labeled 'Secondary'. Grey outline button with grey text 'CONTACT' labeled 'Ghost'.

FOOTER (bottom 3%):
Left: tiny grey text 'MM AGENCY. © 2026 · ALL RIGHTS RESERVED'. Right: tiny faded grey wordmark.

OVERALL: This must look like a real premium design agency brand sheet. Crisp text, perfect alignment, consistent spacing, professional grid layout. Dark mode. Flat design with subtle depth in the icons. Vector quality. NO photography. The iconography section should have the rich, colorful gradient style of NoGood's data visualization graphics — not simple line icons.
negative_prompt: blurry text, illegible text, misspelled words, wrong text, photorealistic, photography, humans, faces, 3D realistic rendering, busy background, white background, light background, watermark, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge, messy layout, overlapping elements, crowded, cluttered, amateur design, clip art, cartoon, hand drawn, sketch, simple line icons, thin stroke icons
